programmes.show_description: Rollins returns to an old case when a child, who is sent to a juvenile detention centre, is released following his 18th birthday.
A troubled young man confesses to the murder of his parents, but Barek and Logan can't shake the feeling that he is innocent.
Goren and Eames investigate when a fire at a church leads to a death. An email insinuates that Deakins got Martinez to lie about the Logan shooting.
A young couple spends too much time arguing and not enough time paying attention to the road. An officer uses his surefire trick to catch someone in a lie.
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Ideal World Shopping - For All Your Shopping Needs
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Power Down: US drama following the work of the navy's dedicated federal agency. An armed assault on an internet service provider leaves a female navy officer dead.
Crime drama series. The team investigates the macabre murder of a marine who was guarding a gifted young girl with access to high level military secrets.
US drama. The team investigates the cold-blooded murder of a devoutly religious marine in what appears to be a hate crime.
An investigation into the murder of a rock singer is hampered by the unorthodox tactics of a cop-turned-writer.
McCoy and Southerlyn try to circumvent the law to access some crucial evidence.
When a skeleton is found, the team discover that the victim was thought to have died during the September 11 attack on the World Trade Center.
When a woman turns up dead and her boyfriend goes missing, Briscoe and Green turn their attention to the last person to see the pair alive.
The prime suspect in a murder investigation claims his knowledge of the death came from a psychic vision.
When the admissions officer at a top school is found dead, Briscoe and Green launch an investigation.
Patriot Down: Crime drama series. When a colleague's murder sends shockwaves through the team, Gibbs uncovers a surprising link to the crime.
Rule Fifty-One: Crime drama series following the US navy's dedicated federal agency. Gibbs heads to Mexico to face his demons and makes a startling decision.
The Spider and The Fly: US crime drama series. The NCIS team become targets of female mobster Paloma Reynosa, who is trying to fulfil her vendetta against Gibbs.
NCIS has to find out the truth behind a tell-all book that threatens a decorated Marine's life before it is published.
A boy disappears after meeting up with an online gamer. Benson suspects her son is being bullied.
When a popular fighter doesn't show up for the biggest bout of the year, Rollins and Velasco are drawn into a complicated web of secrets. McGrath confides in Benson.
Garland asks Benson to investigate a strange domestic violence case when his neighbour is found injured.
Benson and Rollins try to help a homeless single mother who's being trafficked in exchange for safe housing.
Frank works to vindicate a detective accused of excessive force, while Danny and Baez track down the killer responsible for the death of a rapper's bodyguard.
Frank is conflicted about how to deal with a former officer's gripe about his pension. Jamie helps a friend deal with an illicit picture of his daughter on the internet.
A suspect in possession of a stolen truck leads everyone on a chase through some bumpy terrain. Gas station employees call police when they spot a couple asleep at the pump.
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Ideal World Shopping - For All Your Shopping Needs
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Ignition: US drama following the work of the navy's dedicated federal agency. McGee takes the lead when a navy test pilot is found dead wearing an experimental jet pack.
Flesh and Blood: Crime drama series. The agents investigate a suspected assassination attempt on a member of the Saudi royal family.
Jet Lag: US drama following the work of the navy's dedicated federal agency. DiNozzo and Ziva find themselves trapped on a transatlantic flight with an anonymous assassin.
Briscoe and Green think the murder of a businessman was a professional hit, and fingers point to the wife and her lover.
Briscoe and Green investigate a star baseball player in connection with a murder. Was he driven to murder his steroid-dealing chauffeur?
When a limousine driver is found dead in the park, a star major league baseball player who was being blackmailed becomes the prime suspect.
The autopsy of a Russian model suggests she may have suffered long-term abuse, and a toxic screen raises further questions.
Briscoe and Green hope a sniper victim will give clues to the shooter's identity.
Couples: US crime drama series about cops and lawyers. Briscoe and Green investigate several unrelated crimes in one day.
Worst Nightmare: US crime drama series. The team look for a kidnapped 13-year-old girl, but the girl's grandfather hampers their investigations.
Short Fuse: US crime drama series. The team has to work with the FBI when they learn that a female bomb expert is linked to a murder.
Royals and Loyals: US crime series. The team is involved in an international incident, investigating the murder of an American petty officer whose body was found on a British ship.
When the dean of a swanky prep school is murdered, Shaw and Riley must dig into the toxic system of pressure on the students to succeed. Brady's son asks for a favour.
A young woman who learns about her birth parents asks Benson for help. Carisi and Rollins assess the risks of publicly disclosing their relationship.
Benson investigates allegations against a popular radio personality. Rollins goes undercover when a shocking confession leads to another crime.
The investigation into a sex-for-housing scheme expands, putting Benson's loyalty to Garland to the test. Rollins and Carisi attempt to keep their witnesses on board.
